data.body: AC amendment: Fixture must include all required node types for mapping tests. figma-file-response.json must contain at minimum: one FRAME node (with children), one TEXT node (with characters field), one RECTANGLE node (with fills and strokes), one COMPONENT node (with componentId), and one INSTANCE node. Each node must have: id, name, type, absoluteBoundingBox (x, y, width, height), fills, strokes.
